---
name: Feature request / 功能建议
about: Suggest a learning workflow, review feature, lab idea, or project improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement, needs-review
---

## Proposal / 建议

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Learning goal / 学习目标

What should become easier to understand, review, search, or verify?

## Target users / 目标用户

- [ ] First-pass learner
- [ ] Review-stage learner
- [ ] Wrong-problem organizer
- [ ] Maintainer or contributor
- [ ] Other:

## Scope / 范围

- Affected page or workflow:
- Related formula cards or lab types:
- Desktop/mobile considerations:

## Acceptance criteria / 验收标准

- [ ] The feature works without a backend or build tool.
- [ ] It keeps the current static deployment model.
- [ ] It has clear copy or visual feedback for learners.
- [ ] It can be covered by existing or new smoke/browser checks.

## Alternatives / 替代方案

If there is a simpler way to achieve the same learning goal, describe it here.
